name: Moneris Canada Payment Gateway API
what_it_does: Moneris Canada payment gateway REST API for Canadian merchants to accept credit cards, debit cards, Interac Online, Interac Flash, and e-transfer payments with Canadian banking ecosystem integration and PCI-compliant card processing for Canadian e-commerce and in-person payment automation. Enables AI agents to manage credit and debit card payment for Canada e-commerce automation, handle Interac Online bank transfer for Canadian bank payment automation, access Interac Debit (Flash) for Canadian debit acceptance automation, retrieve payment authorization and capture for Canada card management automation, manage recurring billing and tokenization for Canada subscription automation, handle refund and void processing for Canada order management automation, access fraud detection and AVS for Canada card security automation, retrieve transaction reporting for Canada financial reconciliation automation, manage Moneris Vault card storage for Canada recurring payment automation, and integrate Moneris with Canadian e-commerce, retail, and enterprise platforms for end-to-end Canada payment automation.
use_cases: Processing Canadian credit/debit card payments from Canadian merchant agents
Accepting Interac Online from Canada bank payment agents
Managing Interac Flash contactless from Canadian in-person payment agents
Storing cards in Moneris Vault from Canada recurring billing agents
not_for: US payment processing (Moneris is Canada-focused; use Stripe for US)
International payments outside Canada (use Adyen or Checkout.com for global)
Consumer P2P (Moneris is merchant payment processing)
best_when: A Canadian merchant wanting AI agents to automate credit/debit card, Interac Online, and Interac Flash payment acceptance through Moneris, Canada's largest payment processor serving 350,000+ merchants.
avoid_when: FINTRAC AML COMPLIANCE: Moneris operates under FINTRAC (Canada) AML regulations; automated payment operations must comply with FINTRAC reporting requirements; automated high-value payment without FINTRAC compliance creates regulatory reporting obligation. INTERAC ONLINE CUSTOMER REDIRECT REQUIRED: Interac Online requires customer redirect to their online banking; automated Interac checkout must redirect customer to Interac authentication; automated server-side Interac charge without customer bank redirect creates incomplete payment flow. PCI DSS TOKENIZATION: Moneris recommends Moneris Vault tokenization for card storage; automated card-on-file must use Moneris Vault DataKey; automated raw card number storage without Vault creates PCI DSS scope expansion. BATCH SETTLEMENT CANADIAN BANKING HOURS: Moneris settlement follows Canadian banking hours; automated reconciliation must account for Canadian federal holidays; automated daily reconciliation without Canadian banking calendar awareness creates reconciliation mismatch on Canadian stat holidays.

auth.notes: Moneris uses Store ID and API Token for authentication. REST API with JSON/XML. Toronto, Canada HQ. Founded 2000 (joint venture of RBC and BMO). Products: Card processing, Interac Online, Interac Flash, Moneris Vault tokenization, recurring billing, POS. SDKs: PHP, Java, .NET, Python, Node.js, Ruby. PCI DSS. FINTRAC. Serves 350,000+ Canadian merchants. Canada's largest payment processor. Competes with Square and Bambora for Canada payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — Canadian business merchant account required
pricing.paid_tiers: Interchange-plus pricing; monthly fee $20-$35; per-transaction $0.10-0.25 plus interchange
pricing.notes: Toronto CA. RBC/BMO joint venture. Interchange-plus pricing in CAD. Monthly merchant fee.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per store ID; transaction and reporting APIs throttled; webhooks for authorization, refund, and vault events

known_agent_gotchas: STORE ID AND API TOKEN PAIR: Moneris requires both Store ID and API Token for every API request; automated request must include both; automated API Token-only request without Store ID creates authentication failure

TRANSACTION TYPE CODES: Moneris uses specific transaction type codes (purchase, refund, void, preauth, completion); automated payment management must use correct type code; automated wrong transaction type creates incorrect payment action (e.g., void instead of refund)

MONERIS VAULT DATAKEY FOR RECURRING: Moneris card-on-file requires Vault DataKey (from initial tokenized transaction); automated recurring billing must store DataKey at first transaction; automated raw card recurring billing without DataKey creates PCI scope expansion

CANADIAN DOLLAR DECIMAL PRECISION: Moneris amounts use standard CAD decimal (2 decimal places); automated payment must format as '10.00' not '1000' cents; automated cents-based format creates amount 100x smaller than intended

XML vs JSON API FORMAT: Moneris legacy API uses XML while newer REST API uses JSON; automated integration should use REST JSON API; automated XML API use requires XML parsing and creates maintenance burden for older integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Canada payments. PCI-DSS, FINTRAC. Store ID/Token. CA. Card, Interac, and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Canada payments. PCI-DSS. Store ID/Token. CA. Card and Interac data.
